scripts.build: pnpm build:common && pnpm build:api-client && pnpm build:bff && pnpm build:fe && pnpm lint
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter common lint && pnpm --filter bff lint && pnpm --filter fe lint && pnpm --filter api-client lint
scripts.format: pnpm --filter common format && pnpm --filter bff format && pnpm --filter fe format && pnpm --filter api-client format
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter common format:check && pnpm --filter bff format:check && pnpm --filter fe format:check && pnpm --filter api-client format:check
scripts.generate:client: pnpm --filter bff tsoa:spec-and-routes && pnpm --filter api-client generate
